resourceTemplates.name: get-all-list-items
resourceTemplates.title: Get all list items
resourceTemplates.description: Returns all list items (rows) with just the core field values (Title, Created, etc.). No bloat.

resourceTemplates.name: get-list-item-details
resourceTemplates.title: Get list item details
resourceTemplates.description: Fetches a single list item with just the essentials: main fields, timestamps, and author/editor.
